{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260321131401FD2648763BAC31D335B6\"}"},"total":4},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7581365613559563032","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"喜欢听古代各皇帝的历史但总是不能连续希望能连续听"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1765177851,"group_id":"7548380945313713176","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7/h0RF+OUrB16Cgw7NIHfE=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"104705809121","user_name":"恶贯满盈的魏常军"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"104705809121","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7548380945313713176","book_info":{"abstract":"本书以康熙皇帝玄烨一生为主线，从少年登基到晚年辞世，全景展现其六十一年统治历程。书中既写少年玄烨擒鳌拜、亲政掌权的果敢，也述平三藩、收台湾、驱沙俄、征噶尔丹的赫赫武功；既呈现编纂典籍、推行改革的文治成就，也不避晚年储位之争的困境与朝堂隐忧。以通俗笔法还原历史细节，刻画鲜活帝王形象与复杂朝局，勾勒出康熙王朝从动荡走向盛世的兴衰轨迹，兼具历史厚重感与故事吸引力","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/bea220d2c48c101348e21c1b963478c1","author":"吉祥如意北京","author_id":"","book_id":"7548380945313713176","book_name":"康熙王朝：铁血帝王的治国传奇","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#501008","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1328人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":273,\"name\":\"历史古代\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273\u0026name=历史古代\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":12,\"name\":\"历史\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12
